identity.vibe: Texas ranch skincare — honest, no fluff, historic homestead recipes, built for real life

palette.description: navy #204050, dark brown #301800, cream #F0E0B0, accent red #B03030 (arrows/highlights only, NOT pink)

identity.voice: Cinco H Ranch Naturals sounds like a Texas rancher who makes skincare from kitchen-table recipes. Plainspoken, honest, no fluff. Real ingredients (tallow, lard, essential oils, honey). Historical homestead vibes — like grandma's apothecary. Talks about 'nourishing' and 'real ingredients' and 'for the health of your skin and your soul.' Never corporate, never clinical, never spa-fluff (no 'indulgent', no 'luxurious escape', no 'transform your skin'). Headlines are short and direct. Body copy sounds like a product description, not a marketing claim. Texas pride without being loud about it.

ad_creative_rules: Every product label MUST come EXACTLY from the provided product image. Do NOT redraw, recolor, modify, or invent label artwork.
No mascots, cartoon characters, personified objects, or fantasy elements.
Logo appears once only, small, in a corner — no effects, no boxes, no oversized placement.
Background and color grade must use ONLY the brand palette (navy #204050, dark brown #301800, cream #F0E0B0, accent red #B03030). Replace ALL reference colors with brand colors.
Style overlay applies as final unifying step over the entire image.
Text in the ad must sound like it was written by the brand: honest, plainspoken, ranch-real. Never clinical, corporate, or spa-fluff. Match the reference font style.

products.name: Honey Vanilla Soap
products.voice_note: Soap: emphasize the tallow+lard base (mimics skin's natural oils), real honey, real essential oils. Keywords to use naturally: 'real ingredients', 'nourishing lather', 'for the health of your skin and your soul', 'small batch'. Do NOT use: antibacterial language, medical claims, 'deeply cleanses' as if it treats something.

products.name: Rejuvenating Face + Body Cream
products.cap_rule: cream/off-white screw lid — stays as shown in product image; do NOT make it black or any other color
allowed_claims: Rebuilds and reinforces natural skin barrier
products.voice_note: Cream: emphasize how tallow closely matches skin's natural sebum, frankincense, geranium, carrot seed oils. Keywords: 'rebuild your natural skin barrier', 'nourishes and hydrates', 'small batch'. Do NOT use: SPF language (not a sunscreen), medical claims, 'anti-aging cure'.

products.name: Sunscreen Stick
products.cap_rule: twist-up stick with light/neutral cap — keep cap on as shown; do NOT make cap black
products.voice_note: Sunscreen Stick: emphasize tallow+lard base + non-nano zinc oxide + beeswax. Keywords: 'mineral protection', 'nourishing', 'Texas sun', 'real ingredients'. Do NOT use: any SPF number, 'prevents skin cancer', 'waterproof', 'broad spectrum' — no testing done.
